name: Alerts Over Time By Severity
description: This visual shows the number of alerts over time split by severity - useful to identify trends in alert severity over time.. Informational alerts are excluded from this graph.

name: Top blocked IPs
description: This visualization shows the top destination IP addresses that internal hosts attempted to connect to but were blocked by the firewall, ranked by the number of blocked attempts. It helps identify potentially risky or unauthorized outbound connections, such as communication with known malicious hosts, command-and-control servers, or unintended external services.

name: Top allowed traffic by port
description: This visualization shows the most frequently used network ports for allowed traffic, ranked by the number of connections. It helps identify common services and communication patterns within the environment, making it easier to spot unusual or unexpected port usage that could indicate misconfigurations or potential security risks.

name: Comprehensive Port Usage Check
description:
Targets are: Exfiltration, Config issues, Port Abnormalities, etc... 
 Tip:Exfiltration can happen on any open port, thus the DNS 53 was the most common. 
 Additionally, do use the checkbox: Show Previous Period

name: Comprehensive Indirect Scanning check
description:
Targets are: Indirect scanning, zombie scan, Decoy nmap -D -sI , etc ... 
 Tip:Indirect is basically bouncing over something for a final target victim. You are seeing potential victims! Act accordingly

config.title: Comprehensive Indirect Scanning check via Unique Port by DST

name: External connections on Sensitive ports
description: External connections on Sensitive ports 22, 23, 3389, 21, 445, 2049, 1433, 3306, 5432, 27017, 53, 161, 162 for cybersift.threat_info.knownThreat is true

config.title: External connections on Sensitive ports
config.query: isDestinationInternal:false AND (DestinationPort:22 OR DestinationPort:23 OR DestinationPort:3389 OR DestinationPort:21 OR DestinationPort:445 OR DestinationPort:2049 OR DestinationPort:53 OR DestinationPort:161 OR DestinationPort:162 OR DestinationPort:1433 OR DestinationPort:3306 OR DestinationPort:5432 OR DestinationPort:27017) AND cybersift.threat_info.knownThreat:true
